metadata.name: Sign Out a Piece of Equipment

description: A carpenter needs to use a power saw from the on-site tool crib. The tool crib manager must log the checkout.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific power saw by its asset ID number.

expected_outcome.value: The correct asset ID is identified.

nodes.task_description: Log in the equipment tracking system that the saw has been checked out by the specified carpenter.

expected_outcome.value: The checkout is successfully logged, assigning the tool to the carpenter.
